api_key.description: GoLogin API key. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>); never logged.

base_url.description: GoLogin API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page for the profiles stream (1-100). GoLogin's profiles list has no page-size query parameter; this only sets the client-side short-page stop threshold.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages for the profiles stream; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
